title: Architect for Reduced Motion & Photosensitivity
description: Implement `prefers-reduced-motion` media queries to accommodate users with vestibular disorders. Automate animation-throttling to reduce risk for users with photosensitive epilepsy.
objectives: Implement `prefers-reduced-motion` media queries to accommodate users with vestibular disorders.
Automate animation-throttling to reduce risk for users with photosensitive epilepsy.
